summary_en: 114,200 shares acquired for ¥73.6M (1.94% of issued shares ex-treasury) through open-market purchase on Tokyo Stock Exchange, completing the ¥110M authorization limit program (87% consumed). Acquisition period: 2025-11-19 to 2026-05-14. Final block of 6,300 shares for ¥3.9M executed 2026-05-01 to 2026-05-14.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Status and Completion of Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Based on Articles of Association under Company Law Article 165, Paragraph 2)
translation_en_brief: MRT Inc. (TSE Growth, Code 6034) filed a notice on 2026-05-15 reporting completion of a treasury stock acquisition program authorized by board resolution on 2025-11-18. The program ran from 2025-11-19 to 2026-05-14 and acquired 114,200 common shares for a total of ¥73.6M through open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. This represents 1.94% of issued shares (excluding treasury stock). The acquisition consumed ¥73.6M of the ¥110M authorization limit (approximately 67% of the yen limit and 87.8% of the share count limit of 130,000 shares, or 2.2% of outstanding shares). The final execution block of 6,300 shares for ¥3.9M was completed between 2026-05-01 and 2026-05-14, bringing the program to full completion.
